questions.question: Tell me about a time you had to make a difficult technical decision with incomplete information.
questions.answer: Use STAR method: Situation (describe context), Task (your responsibility), Action (steps taken with rationale), Result (outcome and learnings). Show data-driven thinking, risk assessment, stakeholder communication, and adaptability.
questions.explanation: Interviewers assess decision-making framework, risk tolerance, and ability to act under uncertainty. Good answers show systematic thinking, consultation with experts, and willingness to course-correct.
